🚨🇮🇷 **Iran’s 3-option message to Trump: Deal, retreat, or chaos**

Iran has presented the US with three options, Hassan Ahmadian, associate professor at the University of Tehran, wrote on X as Donald Trump argued that he had received a new peace talks-related proposal from Iran that he said “should have been better.”

__The options stipulate three scenarios, Ahmadian noted:
__
🔴   Clinching a framework agreement based on the results of the conflict and the US’ failure, founded on international law recognizing Iran’s economic and legal gains 

🔴   Return to military escalation and resumption of strikes on Iran, a path still supported by some in Trump’s inner circle 

🔴  Strategic pullback—the US ends the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, leaving control of the waterway and post-war balance to Iran and the international community

Iran could pick the first or third option, but it is bracing for the worst-case second scenario, the professor concludes.

Donald Trump has said the US received a new proposal from Iran after canceling a planned trip of negotiators to Pakistan, which has been mediating between the two sides. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi visited Islamabad for talks with Pakistani officials, while Iran said no direct meeting with the US delegation was planned.

Investigators are treating Cole Thomas Allen’s attack on the White House Correspondents Dinner as a “lone wolf” incident, providing vague info about his “anarchist” views, and a $25 donation to Kamala Harris’s 2024 campaign.

The real investigation is taking place online, where OSINT sleuths have already put together a curious collection of evidence adding up to – well you be the judge:

➡️  an Instagram photo of Allen wearing an IDF hoodie

➡️  Weird spikes in interest in the phrase “Cole Thomas Allen” in [Israel](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/68815) – in late January and early April 2026 documented by Google Analytics. Globally, interest exploded only after Saturday’s botched attack 

➡️ [Karoline Leavitt’s ‘joke’ that](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/68810) “some shots” would be “fired tonight in the room” during Trump’s speech

__Then there’s Allen’s professional background:__

🔴  Caltech and California State U grad (mechanical engineering, computer science)

🔴  NASA Jet Propulsion Lab Summer Undergraduate Research Fellowship participant (2014)

🔴  Internship at Fluid Synchrony, a micro-electro-mechanical systems maker that’s developed miniaturized implantable microinfusion pumps for precision drug delivery

🔴  Engineering job at IJK Controls, which makes gimbals, EO/IR and RF tracking systems for the US military, including airborne ISR. Allen worked there from 2017-2018

🔴  Allen has spent the last few years working as an indie game developer and part-time teacher with C2 Education, a pricey private educational services company. His game Bohrdom, a molecular chemistry-themed puzzler, is available on Steam, and he was working on First Law, a top-down space shooter

🔴  a former high school volleyball teammate described Allen as “super stable,” “gentle,” and a “borderline genius” who’s “across the board knowledgeable” and “really curious”

🔴  In December 2023, an X user calling themselves Henry Martinez (HenryMa79561893) registered and posted a single post: the words “Cole Allen”. Investigators believe the name contains Gematria - Kabbalah-based references. Curiously, one H Martinez authored a NASA technical paper on the Orion service vehicle in 2014, the same year Allen had his internship

**🇮🇳🇰🇷🇨🇳  India-South Korea defense cooperation could become headache for China**

Due to the ongoing border dispute between the two countries, China may be wary of India boosting its military power with South Korean weapon systems, Kang Jun-young, a professor of international relations at Hankuk University of Foreign Studies, told the South China Morning Post.

💬 “Since pursuing technology transfer and local production beyond simple exports has the potential to dramatically advance India’s defense self-sufficiency capabilities, China is likely to regard this as a strategic move that threatens its geopolitical interests and security,” argued Kang.

India's military already operates K9 Vajra-T self-propelled howitzers that are based on the design of South Korea’s K9 Thunder.

The fact that South Korea de facto serves as an instrument of the US containment strategy for China may also make China suspicious of this defense industry cooperation.

💬 “Today, Iran is still at the definitive crossroads of inter Eurasia trade,” journalist and geopolitical analyst Pepe Escobar told the Judging Freedom podcast.

Responding to Judge Andrew Napolitano, Escobar said Russia, China, and India see Iran as far too important to be sidelined.

💬  “They [China] just finished the China-Iran railway - the backbone of the East-West connectivity corridor,” he noted. “Almost all of the routes go through Iran.”

Escobar highlighted that while Washington talks pressure, Iran keeps embedding itself deeper into the trade map of the continent.

**📸 Alleged shooter at correspondents’ dinner identified**

The individual involved in the shooting incident at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner is being reported as a 31-year-old man from California.
